pairs.en: Thank you. Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the first nine months of 2024. My name is Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。欢迎参加诺和诺德2024年前九个月财报电话会议。我是Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode，诺和诺德投资者关系负责人。今天与我一同出席的有：诺和诺德首席执行官Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen；执行副总裁兼商业战略与公司事务主管Camilla Sylvest；执行副总裁兼北美运营主管Doug Langa；执行副总裁兼开发主管Martin Holst Lange；以及首席财务官Karsten Munk Knudsen。

Thank you. Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the first nine months of 2024. My name is Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen.

pairs.en: All speakers will be available for the Q&A session. Today's announcement and the slides for this call are available on our website, novonordisk.com. Please note that the call is being webcast live, and a recording will be made available on our website as well. The call is scheduled to last one hour.

Please note that the call is being webcast live, and a recording will be made available on our website as well. The call is scheduled to last one hour.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Thank you, Jacob. Next slide, please. In the first nine months, we delivered 24% sales growth and 22% operating profit growth. This reflects continued scaling of the company, and we now reach around three times more patients with our GLP-1 treatments compared to three years ago.
pairs.zh:
谢谢Jacob。请翻到下一张幻灯片。在前九个月，我们实现了24%的销售增长和22%的营业利润增长。这反映了公司的持续规模化，现在我们用GLP-1治疗药物覆盖的患者数量大约是三年前的三倍。

Thank you, Jacob. Next slide, please. In the first nine months, we delivered 24% sales growth and 22% operating profit growth. This reflects continued scaling of the company, and we now reach around three times more patients with our GLP-1 treatments compared to three years ago.

pairs.en: Increased visibility on the full-year performance has led us to narrow our guidance range. I would like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues. Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability. We are now serving more than 43 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments.
pairs.zh:
全年业绩的可见度提高使我们收窄了业绩指引区间。在将发言权交给我的同事之前，我想先回顾一下我们在战略愿景方面的业绩亮点。首先是我们对使命和可持续性的关注。目前，我们的糖尿病和肥胖症治疗药物正在为超过4300万患者提供服务。

Increased visibility on the full-year performance has led us to narrow our guidance range. I would like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues. Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability. We are now serving more than 43 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments.

pairs.en: This is an increase of almost 3 million patients compared to 12 months ago. Our total carbon emissions rose by 34% compared to the first nine months of 2023. This was primarily driven by our increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand of our treatments. To uphold our commitment of being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41%, compared to 40.5% 12 months ago.
pairs.zh:
与12个月前相比，患者人数增加了近300万。与2023年前九个月相比，我们的总碳排放量上升了34%。这主要是因为我们增加了资本支出投资，以满足治疗需求的高增长。为履行我们作为可持续雇主的承诺，我们将女性担任高级领导职务的比例提升至41%，而12个月前这一比例为40.5%。

This is an increase of almost 3 million patients compared to 12 months ago. Our total carbon emissions rose by 34% compared to the first nine months of 2023. This was primarily driven by our increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand of our treatments. To uphold our commitment of being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41%, compared to 40.5% 12 months ago.

pairs.en: Across all leadership positions, 47% are held by women. In R&D, we had several exciting readouts this quarter, including the phase 3 results from SOUL, STRIDE, and ESSENCE. These results are contributing to an already strong body of evidence on the cardiometabolic profile of semaglutide. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.
pairs.zh:
在所有领导职位中，女性占比47%。在研发方面，本季度我们有几个令人振奋的读出结果，包括来自SOUL、STRIDE和ESSENCE的phase 3数据。这些结果为semaglutide的心血管代谢特征已经强有力的证据库增添了内容。Martin稍后将再次讨论这个问题以及我们整体的研发里程碑。

Across all leadership positions, 47% are held by women. In R&D, we had several exciting readouts this quarter, including the phase 3 results from SOUL, STRIDE, and ESSENCE. These results are contributing to an already strong body of evidence on the cardiometabolic profile of semaglutide. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.

pairs.en: The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. Camilla and Doug will go through the details later. Martin will also go through the financial details, but I'm pleased with the sales growth of 24% in the first nine months of 2024. Before we move on to the detailed performance during the first nine months of this year, I would like to update you on changes to executive management.
pairs.zh:
季度销售增长反映了两大业务单元稳健的商业执行。Camilla和Doug稍后将对细节进行说明。Martin也会介绍财务细节，但我要说我对2024年前九个月的24%销售增长感到满意。在我们继续讨论今年前九个月的详细表现之前，我想向大家通报高管层的人事变动。

The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. Camilla and Doug will go through the details later. Martin will also go through the financial details, but I'm pleased with the sales growth of 24% in the first nine months of 2024. Before we move on to the detailed performance during the first nine months of this year, I would like to update you on changes to executive management.

pairs.en: After more than 13 years with Novo Nordisk and more than seven years as head of North America operations, Doug Langa has decided to step aside from his current responsibility by the end of the year and instead take up a role as senior advisor to Novo Nordisk Executive Management, effective 1st of January 2025. I would like to thank Doug for his excellent contribution to Novo Nordisk and look forward to working with him in his new capacity. Dave, executive vice president with responsibility for business development and corporate strategy, will now also take over the responsibility for Novo Nordisk commercial operations in U.S. while maintaining his responsibility for global business development.
pairs.zh:
在Novo Nordisk工作超过13年并担任北美业务负责人超过7年后，Doug Langa决定在年底前卸任当前职务，转而担任Novo Nordisk执行管理团队的高级顾问，自2025年1月1日起生效。我要感谢Doug对Novo Nordisk的卓越贡献，并期待以他的新身份与他共事。负责业务发展和企业战略的执行副总裁Dave将同时接掌Novo Nordisk在美国的商业运营职责，同时继续负责全球业务发展。

After more than 13 years with Novo Nordisk and more than seven years as head of North America operations, Doug Langa has decided to step aside from his current responsibility by the end of the year and instead take up a role as senior advisor to Novo Nordisk Executive Management, effective 1st of January 2025. I would like to thank Doug for his excellent contribution to Novo Nordisk and look forward to working with him in his new capacity. Dave, executive vice president with responsibility for business development and corporate strategy, will now also take over the responsibility for Novo Nordisk commercial operations in U.S. while maintaining his responsibility for global business development.

pairs.en: Since rejoining Novo Nordisk in 2022, Dave has made a substantial impact and built momentum within business development. I'm confident he'll be able to continue this in his new position. His experience with the U.S. business from previous roles within the company further strengthens his fit for this extended role.
pairs.zh:
自2022年重新加入Novo Nordisk以来，Dave在业务发展领域产生了重大影响并建立了势头。我相信他能在新职位上继续这一态势。他之前在公司的职位中积累的美国业务经验，进一步强化了他胜任这一扩展职责的匹配度。

Since rejoining Novo Nordisk in 2022, Dave has made a substantial impact and built momentum within business development. I'm confident he'll be able to continue this in his new position. His experience with the U.S. business from previous roles within the company further strengthens his fit for this extended role.

pairs.en: With that, I'll give the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution for the first nine months of 2024.
pairs.zh:
那么，我将把发言权交给Camilla，请她介绍2024年前九个月的商业执行情况。

With that, I'll give the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution for the first nine months of 2024.

Camilla Sylvest——执行副总裁，商业战略与公司事务

Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In the first nine months of 2024, our total sales increased by 24%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 31% and International operations growing 15%. The U.S.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars，请翻到下一张幻灯片。在2024年前九个月，我们的总销售额增长了24%。销售增长由两个运营部门共同推动，北美业务增长31%，国际业务增长15%。美国

Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In the first nine months of 2024, our total sales increased by 24%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 31% and International operations growing 15%. The U.S.

pairs.en: sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years. Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased by 26%, driven by North America operations growing 32% and International operations growing 16%. Insulin sales increased by 10%, driven by North America operations growing 31% and International operations growing 4%. Obesity care sales increased 44%, driven by North America growing 32% and International operations growing 95%.
pairs.zh:
销售增长受到与以往年度相关的总净销售调整的积极影响。我们的GLP-1糖尿病销售额增长了26%，其中北美业务增长32%，国际业务增长16%。胰岛素销售额增长了10%，北美业务增长31%，国际业务增长4%。肥胖症护理销售额增长了44%，北美业务增长32%，国际业务增长95%。

sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years. Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased by 26%, driven by North America operations growing 32% and International operations growing 16%. Insulin sales increased by 10%, driven by North America operations growing 31% and International operations growing 4%. Obesity care sales increased 44%, driven by North America growing 32% and International operations growing 95%.

pairs.en: In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the market is moving toward once-weekly treatments. Rare diseases increased by 3%, driven by a 21% sales increase in North America, partly offset by a 9% decline in the International operations. Please turn to the next slide. Before turning to the details of our performance, I would like to talk about the impact of our scaling efforts.
pairs.zh:
在这两个地区，增长均由Wegovy推动，但部分被Saxenda销售额下降所抵消，因为市场正转向每周一次的治疗方案。罕见病业务增长3%，得益于北美地区销售额增长21%，但部分被国际业务下降9%所抵消。请翻到下一页。在介绍业绩细节之前，我想先谈谈我们的规模化努力所带来的影响。

In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the market is moving toward once-weekly treatments. Rare diseases increased by 3%, driven by a 21% sales increase in North America, partly offset by a 9% decline in the International operations. Please turn to the next slide. Before turning to the details of our performance, I would like to talk about the impact of our scaling efforts.

pairs.en: Our patient reach across GLP-1 for diabetes and obesity has tripled over the past three years. We have now extended our global reach to around 11.5 million patients according to IQVIA numbers. This means that we have increased our reach by almost 8 million patients in three years. This increase has been driven by our weekly injectable treatments across both North America operations and International operations.
pairs.zh:
我们过去三年在GLP-1糖尿病和肥胖症领域的患者覆盖范围增长了三倍。根据IQVIA数据，我们现在全球覆盖已达约1150万患者。这意味着三年内我们的覆盖范围增加了近800万患者。这一增长得益于我们在北美和国际业务中的每周注射治疗。

原文：
Our patient reach across GLP-1 for diabetes and obesity has tripled over the past three years. We have now extended our global reach to around 11.5 million patients according to IQVIA numbers. This means that we have increased our reach by almost 8 million patients in three years. This increase has been driven by our weekly injectable treatments across both North America operations and International operations.

pairs.en: Of all patients on GLP-1 across diabetes and obesity, Novo Nordisk is currently supplying treatment to almost two-thirds of those. Going forward, we will continue to pursue an innovation-based strategy driven by the growth of our GLP-1 treatments. This is supported by our continued scaling efforts and in significant investments in the supply chain in the past years. In order to reach even more patients with our treatments, we also continued to work with portfolio optimizations and product presentations.
pairs.zh:
在所有使用GLP-1治疗的糖尿病和肥胖症患者中，Novo Nordisk目前为其中近two-thirds的患者提供治疗。未来，我们将继续推行以创新为基础的战略，由我们的GLP-1治疗药物增长驱动。这一战略得益于我们持续的规模化努力以及过去几年在供应链中的重大投资。为了让更多患者获得我们的治疗，我们也在持续进行产品组合优化和产品展示。

Of all patients on GLP-1 across diabetes and obesity, Novo Nordisk is currently supplying treatment to almost two-thirds of those. Going forward, we will continue to pursue an innovation-based strategy driven by the growth of our GLP-1 treatments. This is supported by our continued scaling efforts and in significant investments in the supply chain in the past years. In order to reach even more patients with our treatments, we also continued to work with portfolio optimizations and product presentations.

pairs.en: Please turn to the next slide. Within Diabetes care, we are growing 21%, which is faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share has increased over the last 12 months to 33.9%. This is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes market value in 2025.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一页幻灯片。在Diabetes care领域，我们的增长率达到21%，超过了整个糖尿病市场的增速。因此，过去12个月内，我们的全球糖尿病价值市场份额已增至33.9%。这超过了我们在2025年达到全球糖尿病市场价值三分之一的战略目标。

Please turn to the next slide. Within Diabetes care, we are growing 21%, which is faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share has increased over the last 12 months to 33.9%. This is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes market value in 2025.

pairs.en: The market share increase was driven by market share gains in both North America operations and International operations. Please turn to the next slide. In International operations, Diabetes care sales increased by 10% in the first nine months of 2024, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 diabetes sales growing 16%. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in International operations with a GLP-1 diabetes value market share of almost 67%.
pairs.zh:
市场份额的增长得益于北美业务和国际业务的市场份额提升。请翻到下一页。在国际业务中，2024年前九个月糖尿病护理销售额增长了10%，主要得益于GLP-1糖尿病销售额增长16%。Novo Nordisk仍然是国际业务的市场领导者，其GLP-1糖尿病价值市场份额接近67%。

The market share increase was driven by market share gains in both North America operations and International operations. Please turn to the next slide. In International operations, Diabetes care sales increased by 10% in the first nine months of 2024, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 diabetes sales growing 16%. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in International operations with a GLP-1 diabetes value market share of almost 67%.

pairs.en: Ozempic is still the GLP-1 diabetes market leader with 44% market share. We're also pleased to see Rybelsus increasing its market share to almost 18% of the overall diabetes market in International operations, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over the word to Doug.
pairs.zh:
Ozempic仍然是GLP-1糖尿病市场的领导者，拥有44%的市场份额。我们也很高兴地看到，Rybelsus在国际业务中的整体糖尿病市场份额已提升至近18%，这得益于各地区市场的强劲增长。接下来，我将把发言权交给Doug。

Ozempic is still the GLP-1 diabetes market leader with 44% market share. We're also pleased to see Rybelsus increasing its market share to almost 18% of the overall diabetes market in International operations, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over the word to Doug.

increased by 33%. The sales increase was driven -- was mainly driven by the continued uptake of Ozempic. 请翻到下一页。Wegovy全球销售额增长了77%，主要受到北美业务50%增长的推动。品牌肥胖市场的整体销量增长了95%。Novo Nordisk的销售额增长是由销量增加驱动的，部分被美国实现价格下降所抵消。

Please go to the next slide. Wegovy sales increased by 77% globally, driven by a 50% growth in North America operations. The volume growth of the total branded obesity market was 95%. Novo Nordisk's sales growth was driven by increased volumes, partially countered by lower realized prices in the U.S.

pairs.en: The positive growth development was also reflected in the Wegovy prescription trends in the U.S., which has now reached almost 215,000 weekly prescriptions. In Q3, we treated more than twice as many patients on Wegovy in the U.S. compared to 12 months ago. In the U.S., market access continues to increase and Wegovy currently has coverage for around 55 million people living with obesity.
pairs.zh:
这一积极增长趋势也体现在Wegovy在美国的处方量上，目前周处方量已接近21.5万。第三季度，我们在美国接受Wegovy治疗的患者数量是12个月前的两倍以上。在美国，市场准入持续扩大，目前约有5500万肥胖人群可覆盖Wegovy的治疗。

The positive growth development was also reflected in the Wegovy prescription trends in the U.S., which has now reached almost 215,000 weekly prescriptions. In Q3, we treated more than twice as many patients on Wegovy in the U.S. compared to 12 months ago. In the U.S., market access continues to increase and Wegovy currently has coverage for around 55 million people living with obesity.

pairs.en: In International operations, Wegovy sales accelerated in Q3 to DKK 7 billion and has now been launched in more than 15 countries, underlining our commitment to reach more patients. We continue to strive to safeguard continuity of care for patients. Next slide, please. Our Rare Disease sales increased by 3%.
pairs.zh:
在国际业务中，Wegovy的销售额在第三季度加速增长至700亿丹麦克朗，并已在超过15个国家推出，彰显了我们接触更多患者的承诺。我们持续努力保障患者护理的连续性。请翻到下一张幻灯片。我们的Rare Disease销售额增长了3%。

In International operations, Wegovy sales accelerated in Q3 to DKK 7 billion and has now been launched in more than 15 countries, underlining our commitment to reach more patients. We continue to strive to safeguard continuity of care for patients. Next slide, please. Our Rare Disease sales increased by 3%.

pairs.en: Sales in North America operations increased by 21%, reflecting the Sogroya launch and positive gross-to-net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. This was partially offset by a 9% sales decrease in International operations. Norditropin supply is gradually improving, and Novo Nordisk is working on reestablishing supply of rare endocrine disorder products. Rare blood disorder sales increased -- excuse me, decreased by 1%, driven by lower NovoSeven and hemophilia A sales.
pairs.zh:
北美业务销售额增长了21%，主要得益于Sogroya的上市以及美国与前几年相关的正向毛利润调整。这在一定程度上被国际业务销售额下降9%所抵消。Norditropin供应正在逐步改善，Novo Nordisk正致力于重建罕见内分泌疾病产品的供应。罕见血液疾病销售额下降了1%（请见谅，应为下降），原因是NovoSeven和血友病A产品销售额下降。

Sales in North America operations increased by 21%, reflecting the Sogroya launch and positive gross-to-net adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. This was partially offset by a 9% sales decrease in International operations. Norditropin supply is gradually improving, and Novo Nordisk is working on reestablishing supply of rare endocrine disorder products. Rare blood disorder sales increased -- excuse me, decreased by 1%, driven by lower NovoSeven and hemophilia A sales.

pairs.en: The decline in hemophilia A sales was impacted by reduced demand for legacy products, NovoSeven and NovoEight, while Esperoct uptake continues. This was partially countered by increased hemophilia B sales. Now with that, over to you, Martin, for an update on R&D.
pairs.zh:
血友病A销售额下降受到传统产品NovoSeven和NovoEight需求减少的影响，而Esperoct的销售持续增长。这一下降被血友病B销售额的增长部分抵消。接下来，有请Martin来更新研发进展。

The decline in hemophilia A sales was impacted by reduced demand for legacy products, NovoSeven and NovoEight, while Esperoct uptake continues. This was partially countered by increased hemophilia B sales. Now with that, over to you, Martin, for an update on R&D.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. Chronic noncommunicable diseases continue to affect millions of people around the world and represents a major public health concern. By leveraging our extensive experience within metabolic diseases, we have deepened our understanding of what semaglutide can do for these patients.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Doug。请翻到下一页幻灯片。慢性非传染性疾病仍在影响全球数百万人，是一个重大的公共卫生问题。凭借我们在代谢疾病领域的丰富经验，我们加深了对semaglutide能为这些患者带来什么的理解。

Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. Chronic noncommunicable diseases continue to affect millions of people around the world and represents a major public health concern. By leveraging our extensive experience within metabolic diseases, we have deepened our understanding of what semaglutide can do for these patients.

pairs.en: Based on the clinical evidence we have generated so far, it has now become evident that the benefits of semaglutide extend beyond glycemic control and beyond weight loss. Semaglutide has consistently demonstrated substantial cardiovascular and kidney risk reductions and functional improvements across several outcome studies. These now include SUSTAIN 6, PIONEER 6, SOUL, STRIDE, and FLOW in type 2 diabetes, along with STEP-HFpEF and selected obesity. The benefits of semaglutide have also been demonstrated in addressing knee osteoarthritis in the STEP OA trial, as well as in the metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis, in short, MASH, in the ESSENCE trial.
pairs.zh:
根据我们目前积累的临床证据，现已明确显示，semaglutide的益处不仅限于血糖控制和减重。多项结局研究一致表明，semaglutide能显著降低心血管和肾脏风险，并改善功能。这些研究包括针对2型糖尿病的SUSTAIN 6、PIONEER 6、SOUL、STRIDE和FLOW，以及STEP-HFpEF和特定肥胖症。此外，semaglutide的益处也在STEP OA试验中针对膝骨关节炎，以及在ESSENCE试验中针对代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝炎（简称MASH）得到证实。

Based on the clinical evidence we have generated so far, it has now become evident that the benefits of semaglutide extend beyond glycemic control and beyond weight loss. Semaglutide has consistently demonstrated substantial cardiovascular and kidney risk reductions and functional improvements across several outcome studies. These now include SUSTAIN 6, PIONEER 6, SOUL, STRIDE, and FLOW in type 2 diabetes, along with STEP-HFpEF and selected obesity. The benefits of semaglutide have also been demonstrated in addressing knee osteoarthritis in the STEP OA trial, as well as in the metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis, in short, MASH, in the ESSENCE trial.

pairs.en: I will get back to the latter later in this presentation. Looking ahead, we continue to generate further evidence regarding the benefits of semaglutide. For example, this includes the evoke trials in people with Alzheimer's disease and the ASCEND PLUS trial investigating primary prevention of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease in patients with type 2 diabetes and no established cardiovascular disease. Altogether, semaglutide is a remarkable molecule capable of addressing multiple comorbidities associated with diabetes and obesity in a holistic way, and we look forward to upcoming trial readouts.
pairs.zh:
我将稍后在本演讲中再谈及后者。展望未来，我们持续积累关于semaglutide获益的更多证据。例如，这包括针对阿尔茨海默病患者的evoke trials，以及ASCEND PLUS试验——该试验旨在研究无已确诊心血管疾病的2型糖尿病患者中动脉粥样硬化性心血管疾病的一级预防。总体而言，semaglutide是一种卓越的分子，能够以整体方式应对与糖尿病和肥胖相关的多种合并症，我们期待即将公布的试验结果。

I will get back to the latter later in this presentation. Looking ahead, we continue to generate further evidence regarding the benefits of semaglutide. For example, this includes the evoke trials in people with Alzheimer's disease and the ASCEND PLUS trial investigating primary prevention of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease in patients with type 2 diabetes and no established cardiovascular disease. Altogether, semaglutide is a remarkable molecule capable of addressing multiple comorbidities associated with diabetes and obesity in a holistic way, and we look forward to upcoming trial readouts.

pairs.en: Next slide, please. In October, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from the SOUL trial. SOUL was a large cardiovascular outcomes trial and was conducted across 33 countries and more than 400 investigational sites. 9,650 people were enrolled and randomized in a 1:1 ratio to receive oral semaglutide 14 milligram or placebo on top of standard of care.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一张幻灯片。10月，Novo Nordisk公布了SOUL试验的初步结果。SOUL是一项大型心血管结局试验，在33个国家和超过400个研究中心进行。共有9,650名受试者入组，并以1:1的比例随机分配，在标准治疗基础上接受口服semaglutide 14毫克或安慰剂。

Next slide, please. In October, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from the SOUL trial. SOUL was a large cardiovascular outcomes trial and was conducted across 33 countries and more than 400 investigational sites. 9,650 people were enrolled and randomized in a 1:1 ratio to receive oral semaglutide 14 milligram or placebo on top of standard of care.

pairs.en: The eligibility criteria were designed to include patients with type 2 diabetes with established cardiovascular disease as defined by prior myocardial infarction, stroke or peripheral arterial disease and/or chronic kidney disease. Importantly, as part of standard of care, 49% of patients received an SGLT2 inhibitor at some point during the trial with a higher proportion in the placebo group than in the semaglutide group. The primary objective of the trial was to demonstrate superiority of oral semaglutide versus placebo on top of standard of care for prevention of the primary endpoint of major adverse cardiovascular event. The key secondary objectives of the trial was to compare the effects of oral semaglutide to placebo with regards to mortality, renal function, peripheral artery disease, glucose metabolism and body weight.
pairs.zh:
入选标准旨在纳入患有2型糖尿病且已确诊心血管疾病的患者，这些患者需有既往心肌梗死、卒中或外周动脉疾病和/或慢性肾病的病史。值得注意的是，作为标准治疗的一部分，49%的患者在试验期间曾接受SGLT2抑制剂治疗，且安慰剂组的比例高于semaglutide组。该试验的主要目标是在标准治疗基础上，证明口服semaglutide相比安慰剂在预防主要不良心血管事件这一主要终点方面的优效性。试验的关键次要目标是比较口服semaglutide与安慰剂在死亡率、肾功能、外周动脉疾病、糖代谢和体重方面的影响。

The eligibility criteria were designed to include patients with type 2 diabetes with established cardiovascular disease as defined by prior myocardial infarction, stroke or peripheral arterial disease and/or chronic kidney disease. Importantly, as part of standard of care, 49% of patients received an SGLT2 inhibitor at some point during the trial with a higher proportion in the placebo group than in the semaglutide group. The primary objective of the trial was to demonstrate superiority of oral semaglutide versus placebo on top of standard of care for prevention of the primary endpoint of major adverse cardiovascular event. The key secondary objectives of the trial was to compare the effects of oral semaglutide to placebo with regards to mortality, renal function, peripheral artery disease, glucose metabolism and body weight.

pairs.en: I'm very pleased to announce that SOUL achieved its primary endpoint, and that oral semaglutide demonstrated a 14% reduction in major adverse cardiovascular events versus placebo. All components of the primary endpoint contributed to the overall cardiovascular risk reduction. Given the extensive use of SGLT2 inhibitors, which are independently associated with cardiovascular benefits and are included as part of the standard of care in SOUL, we find that the overall risk reduction on top of standard of care aligns broadly with other semaglutide outcomes trials. We are pleased that for patients who prefer an oral GLP-1 receptor agonist, SOUL has demonstrated that oral semaglutide provides a superior cardiovascular risk reduction compared to placebo on top of standard of care.
pairs.zh:
非常高兴地宣布，SOUL试验达到了其主要终点，口服semaglutide与安慰剂相比，主要不良心血管事件风险降低了14%。主要终点的所有组成部分均对总体心血管风险降低有所贡献。鉴于SGLT2抑制剂被广泛使用，这些药物本身与心血管获益相关，并且作为标准治疗的一部分纳入SOUL试验，我们发现，在标准治疗基础上实现的总体风险降低与其他semaglutide结局试验基本一致。我们感到欣慰的是，对于偏好口服GLP-1受体激动剂的患者，SOUL试验已证明，在标准治疗基础上，口服semaglutide与安慰剂相比可提供更优的心血管风险降低。

原文：
I'm very pleased to announce that SOUL achieved its primary endpoint, and that oral semaglutide demonstrated a 14% reduction in major adverse cardiovascular events versus placebo. All components of the primary endpoint contributed to the overall cardiovascular risk reduction. Given the extensive use of SGLT2 inhibitors, which are independently associated with cardiovascular benefits and are included as part of the standard of care in SOUL, we find that the overall risk reduction on top of standard of care aligns broadly with other semaglutide outcomes trials. We are pleased that for patients who prefer an oral GLP-1 receptor agonist, SOUL has demonstrated that oral semaglutide provides a superior cardiovascular risk reduction compared to placebo on top of standard of care.

pairs.en: In the trial, oral semaglutide appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. This is in line with previous trials investigating oral semaglutide. We expect to file for regulatory approval of a cardiovascular label indication expansion for oral semaglutide around the turn of the year. Next slide, please.
pairs.zh:
在试验中，口服semaglutide表现出安全且耐受性良好的特性。这与之前研究口服semaglutide的试验结果一致。我们预计将在年底前后提交监管申请，寻求扩展口服semaglutide的心血管标签适应症。请翻到下一张幻灯片。

In the trial, oral semaglutide appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. This is in line with previous trials investigating oral semaglutide. We expect to file for regulatory approval of a cardiovascular label indication expansion for oral semaglutide around the turn of the year. Next slide, please.

pairs.en: On 1st of November, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from Part 1 of the ongoing ESSENCE trial. ESSENCE is a phase 3 trial evaluating the effect of once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide 2.4 milligrams in adults with MASH with moderate to advanced liver fibrosis. ESSENCE is being conducted across 37 countries and over 400 sites. It's a two-part trial with 1,200 MASH participants were randomized in a 2:1 fashion to receive either semaglutide 2.4 milligram or placebo on top of standard of care for a total of 240 weeks.
pairs.zh:
11月1日，Novo Nordisk公布了正在进行的ESSENCE试验第一部分的顶线结果。ESSENCE是一项3期试验，评估每周一次皮下注射semaglutide 2.4毫克对伴有中重度肝纤维化的MASH成年患者的疗效。ESSENCE试验在37个国家、超过400个中心进行。该试验分为两部分，1200名MASH参与者按2:1的比例随机分配，在标准治疗基础上接受semaglutide 2.4毫克或安慰剂，总疗程为240周。

On 1st of November, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from Part 1 of the ongoing ESSENCE trial. ESSENCE is a phase 3 trial evaluating the effect of once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide 2.4 milligrams in adults with MASH with moderate to advanced liver fibrosis. ESSENCE is being conducted across 37 countries and over 400 sites. It's a two-part trial with 1,200 MASH participants were randomized in a 2:1 fashion to receive either semaglutide 2.4 milligram or placebo on top of standard of care for a total of 240 weeks.

pairs.en: In Part 1, the objective was to demonstrate that treatment with semaglutide 2.4 milligrams improves liver histology at week 72 in the first 800 randomized participants. In Part 2, the objective is to demonstrate that treatment with semaglutide 2.4 milligrams lower the risk of liver-related clinical events compared to placebo at 240 weeks in 1,200 randomized subjects. Next slide, please. I'm very pleased to announce that the ESSENCE trial achieved both primary endpoints and demonstrated statistically significant and superior improvements in both MASH resolution and liver fibrosis with semaglutide 2.4 milligram compared to placebo.
pairs.zh:
在第一部分中，目标是在前800名随机参与者中，证明使用semaglutide 2.4毫克治疗在第72周能改善肝脏组织学。在第二部分中，目标是在1,200名随机受试者中，证明使用semaglutide 2.4毫克治疗在第240周时，相比安慰剂能降低肝脏相关临床事件的风险。请翻到下一张幻灯片。我非常高兴地宣布，ESSENCE试验达到了两个主要终点，并证明与安慰剂相比，semaglutide 2.4毫克在MASH消退和肝纤维化方面均具有统计学显著且更优的改善。

In Part 1, the objective was to demonstrate that treatment with semaglutide 2.4 milligrams improves liver histology at week 72 in the first 800 randomized participants. In Part 2, the objective is to demonstrate that treatment with semaglutide 2.4 milligrams lower the risk of liver-related clinical events compared to placebo at 240 weeks in 1,200 randomized subjects. Next slide, please. I'm very pleased to announce that the ESSENCE trial achieved both primary endpoints and demonstrated statistically significant and superior improvements in both MASH resolution and liver fibrosis with semaglutide 2.4 milligram compared to placebo.

pairs.en: By week 72 from baseline, 37% of people treated with semaglutide 2.4 milligram achieved improved liver fibrosis with no worsening of steatohepatitis, while 63% achieved resolution of steatohepatitis with no worsening of liver fibrosis. To put this into perspective, the ESSENCE phase 3 results are the best phase 3 results within the MASH area to date. In the trial, semaglutide 2.4 milligram appears to have a safe and well-tolerated profile, which is in line with previous semaglutide 2.4 milligram trials. We're very pleased about the ESSENCE clinical trial results and the potential of semaglutide to help people living with MASH.
pairs.zh:
从基线到第72周，使用semaglutide 2.4毫克的患者中，37%实现了肝纤维化改善且脂肪性肝炎未恶化，63%实现了脂肪性肝炎消退且肝纤维化未恶化。从这个角度来看，ESSENCE 3期结果是MASH领域迄今为止最好的3期结果。在该试验中，semaglutide 2.4毫克显示出安全且耐受性良好的特征，这与之前的semaglutide 2.4毫克试验一致。我们对ESSENCE临床试验结果以及semaglutide帮助MASH患者的潜力感到非常满意。

By week 72 from baseline, 37% of people treated with semaglutide 2.4 milligram achieved improved liver fibrosis with no worsening of steatohepatitis, while 63% achieved resolution of steatohepatitis with no worsening of liver fibrosis. To put this into perspective, the ESSENCE phase 3 results are the best phase 3 results within the MASH area to date. In the trial, semaglutide 2.4 milligram appears to have a safe and well-tolerated profile, which is in line with previous semaglutide 2.4 milligram trials. We're very pleased about the ESSENCE clinical trial results and the potential of semaglutide to help people living with MASH.

pairs.en: Among the many people with overweight or obesity, one in three live with MASH. This has a serious impact on the health and represents a significant unmet need. We believe that with the ESSENCE data, semaglutide is well-positioned as a foundational treatment for people with MASH and fibrosis Stage 2 and 3 and offers further additional benefits, including weight loss, glycemic control, cardiovascular risk reduction relevant for this population. We expect to file for regulatory approvals in the U.S.
pairs.zh:
在众多超重或肥胖人群中，每三人中就有一人患有MASH。这对其健康造成严重影响，并代表着一个巨大的未满足需求。我们相信，基于ESSENCE数据，semaglutide可作为MASH合并2级和3级纤维化患者的基础治疗，同时为该人群带来额外获益，包括体重减轻、血糖控制及相关心血管风险降低。我们预计将在美国提交监管审批申请。

原文：
Among the many people with overweight or obesity, one in three live with MASH. This has a serious impact on the health and represents a significant unmet need. We believe that with the ESSENCE data, semaglutide is well-positioned as a foundational treatment for people with MASH and fibrosis Stage 2 and 3 and offers further additional benefits, including weight loss, glycemic control, cardiovascular risk reduction relevant for this population. We expect to file for regulatory approvals in the U.S.

pairs.en: and EU in the first half of 2025. The detailed results from ESSENCE will be presented at AASLD, the American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases. Part 2 of the ESSENCE trials will continue with expected readout in 2029. Next slide.
pairs.zh:
和欧盟在2025年上半年。ESSENCE的详细结果将在AASLD（美国肝脏研究协会）上公布。ESSENCE试验的第二部分将继续进行，预计在2029年得出结果。下一张幻灯片。

and EU in the first half of 2025. The detailed results from ESSENCE will be presented at AASLD, the American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases. Part 2 of the ESSENCE trials will continue with expected readout in 2029. Next slide.

pairs.en: Now I would like to bring your attention to some of the quarterly and upcoming R&D events, which include anticipated trial readouts and initiations for this year. During Q3 in Diabetes, the functional outcomes trial, STRIDE, was successfully completed. The STRIDE trial is a 52-week trial comparing to semaglutide 1.0 milligram with placebo on top of standard of care. The trial included people living with type 2 diabetes and peripheral arterial disease with intermittent claudication and a condition characterized by muscle pains in the legs during physical activity.
pairs.zh:
现在我想请大家关注一些季度及即将开展的研发活动，其中包括今年预期的试验结果和启动。在糖尿病领域，第三季度功能性结局试验STRIDE已成功完成。STRIDE试验是一项为期52周的试验，对比semaglutide 1.0毫克与安慰剂在标准治疗基础上的效果。该试验纳入了患有2型糖尿病、外周动脉疾病伴间歇性跛行以及一种以体力活动期间腿部肌肉疼痛为特征的疾病患者。

原文：
Now I would like to bring your attention to some of the quarterly and upcoming R&D events, which include anticipated trial readouts and initiations for this year. During Q3 in Diabetes, the functional outcomes trial, STRIDE, was successfully completed. The STRIDE trial is a 52-week trial comparing to semaglutide 1.0 milligram with placebo on top of standard of care. The trial included people living with type 2 diabetes and peripheral arterial disease with intermittent claudication and a condition characterized by muscle pains in the legs during physical activity.

pairs.en: The primary functional endpoint is measured by constant-load treadmill test. It is important to note that the treadmill test is not equivalent to the 6-minute walking test on a flat surface as we know from, for example, the STEP heart failure studies. The constant-load treadmill test in STRIDE is performed at a single work rate of 3 kilometers per hour at an inclination of 12%, which corresponds to walking up a steep hill at a constant pace. After 52 weeks, the trial achieved its primary endpoint by demonstrating a statistically significant and superior improvement in maximum walking distance of 13% for people treating with semaglutide 1.0 milligram compared to placebo.
pairs.zh:
主要功能终点通过恒定负荷跑步机测试来评估。需要注意的是，跑步机测试与我们在STEP心力衰竭研究等中所知的平地6分钟步行测试并不相同。STRIDE研究中的恒定负荷跑步机测试以每小时3公里的单一工作速率进行，坡度设置为12%，这相当于以恒定速度爬陡坡。52周后，该试验达到了其主要终点，结果显示与安慰剂相比，使用semaglutide 1.0毫克治疗的患者最大步行距离显著改善了13%，具有统计学意义和优越性。

The primary functional endpoint is measured by constant-load treadmill test. It is important to note that the treadmill test is not equivalent to the 6-minute walking test on a flat surface as we know from, for example, the STEP heart failure studies. The constant-load treadmill test in STRIDE is performed at a single work rate of 3 kilometers per hour at an inclination of 12%, which corresponds to walking up a steep hill at a constant pace. After 52 weeks, the trial achieved its primary endpoint by demonstrating a statistically significant and superior improvement in maximum walking distance of 13% for people treating with semaglutide 1.0 milligram compared to placebo.

pairs.en: The 13% improvement represents immediate change in maximum walking distance of 26 meters and a mean change of 40 meters, which is considered clinically relevant. In the semaglutide arm, the walking -- the maximum walking distance increased by 60 -- sorry, 21% from baseline of 185 meters. While in the placebo arm, it increased by 8% from a baseline of 186 meters. Overall, the STRIDE results are good news for people living with peripheral arterial disease and type 2 diabetes whose everyday life is impacted by reduced walking capacity and pain.
pairs.zh:
13%的改善代表最大步行距离立即改变26米，平均改变40米，这被认为具有临床意义。在semaglutide组中，最大步行距离从基线185米增加60%——抱歉，21%。而安慰剂组从基线186米增加8%。总体而言，STRIDE试验结果对于因步行能力下降和疼痛影响日常生活的周围动脉疾病和2型糖尿病患者来说是个好消息。

The 13% improvement represents immediate change in maximum walking distance of 26 meters and a mean change of 40 meters, which is considered clinically relevant. In the semaglutide arm, the walking -- the maximum walking distance increased by 60 -- sorry, 21% from baseline of 185 meters. While in the placebo arm, it increased by 8% from a baseline of 186 meters. Overall, the STRIDE results are good news for people living with peripheral arterial disease and type 2 diabetes whose everyday life is impacted by reduced walking capacity and pain.

pairs.en: Novo Nordisk expects to file for regulatory approval of a label expansion for Ozempic in the U.S. and EU in the first half of 2025. The successfully completed SOUL and STRIDE trials adds to the growing body of evidence underlining the cardiometabolic benefits of semaglutide. To continue within the Diabetes domain, a phase 2 trial has been initiated with once-weekly subcutaneous and once-daily oral amycretin in people with type 2 diabetes in Q3.
pairs.zh:
Novo Nordisk预计将在2025年上半年提交申请，以寻求Ozempic标签扩展在美国和欧盟的监管批准。成功完成的SOUL和STRIDE试验进一步增加了支持semaglutide心脏代谢益处的证据。为继续在糖尿病领域深耕，第三季度已启动了一项针对2型糖尿病患者的2期试验，该试验使用每周一次皮下注射和每日一次口服amycretin。

原文：
Novo Nordisk expects to file for regulatory approval of a label expansion for Ozempic in the U.S. and EU in the first half of 2025. The successfully completed SOUL and STRIDE trials adds to the growing body of evidence underlining the cardiometabolic benefits of semaglutide. To continue within the Diabetes domain, a phase 2 trial has been initiated with once-weekly subcutaneous and once-daily oral amycretin in people with type 2 diabetes in Q3.

pairs.en: And we are anticipating the phase 2 readout for monlunabant in diabetes kidney indices in Q4. Lastly, within Diabetes, we are awaiting the regulatory decisions on the submitted FLOW data in U.S. and EU in the first half of 2025. Within Obesity, the European Medicines Agency has adopted a positive opinion for an update of the Wegovy label in EU.
pairs.zh:
我们预计 monlunabant 在糖尿病肾脏指标方面的第二阶段数据读出将在 Q4 进行。最后，在糖尿病领域，我们正在等待美国及欧盟针对已提交的 FLOW 数据在 2025 年上半年做出监管决定。在肥胖症领域，欧洲药品管理局已采纳积极意见，支持在欧盟更新 Wegovy 的说明书。

And we are anticipating the phase 2 readout for monlunabant in diabetes kidney indices in Q4. Lastly, within Diabetes, we are awaiting the regulatory decisions on the submitted FLOW data in U.S. and EU in the first half of 2025. Within Obesity, the European Medicines Agency has adopted a positive opinion for an update of the Wegovy label in EU.

pairs.en: The labels update incorporates data showing that Wegovy, when added to standard of care, can reduce heart failure-related symptoms and improve physical limitations and exercise function in people with obesity-related HFpEF with or without type 2 diabetes. The positive opinion is based on results from the STEP HFpEF and the STEP HFpEF DM trials. Further, a positive opinion was also issued based on data from the STEP 9 trial in people with obesity and knee osteoarthritis. In Q3, the phase 2a trial with monlunabant was completed.
pairs.zh:
标签更新纳入了数据显示，Wegovy在标准治疗基础上，可减少与肥胖相关的HFpEF患者（伴有或不伴有2型糖尿病）的心力衰竭相关症状，并改善身体限制和运动功能。这一积极意见基于STEP HFpEF和STEP HFpEF DM试验的结果。此外，基于STEP 9试验在肥胖和膝骨关节炎患者中的数据，也发布了积极意见。在Q3，monlunabant的2a期试验已完成。

The labels update incorporates data showing that Wegovy, when added to standard of care, can reduce heart failure-related symptoms and improve physical limitations and exercise function in people with obesity-related HFpEF with or without type 2 diabetes. The positive opinion is based on results from the STEP HFpEF and the STEP HFpEF DM trials. Further, a positive opinion was also issued based on data from the STEP 9 trial in people with obesity and knee osteoarthritis. In Q3, the phase 2a trial with monlunabant was completed.

pairs.en: As previously communicated, we expect to initiate a larger phase 2b trial in obesity to further investigate dosing and the safety profile of monlunabant over a longer duration in a global population in 2025. We have also initiated a phase 1 trial with once-weekly subcutaneous Amylin 355. The 12-week trial is investigating safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of different doses of Amylin 355 in people with overweight, obesity. Looking ahead, later in Q4, we anticipate the first phase 3 results for CagriSema mainly from the REDEFINE 1 study.
pairs.zh:
如先前所述，我们预计将于2025年在全球人群中启动一项更大规模的2b期肥胖症试验，以进一步研究monlunabant在更长时间内的给药方案及安全性。我们还启动了一项每周一次皮下注射Amylin 355的1期试验。这项为期12周的试验正在研究不同剂量Amylin 355在超重和肥胖人群中的安全性、耐受性、药代动力学和药效学。展望未来，在第四季度晚些时候，我们预计将获得CagriSema的首个3期结果，主要来自REDEFINE 1研究。

As previously communicated, we expect to initiate a larger phase 2b trial in obesity to further investigate dosing and the safety profile of monlunabant over a longer duration in a global population in 2025. We have also initiated a phase 1 trial with once-weekly subcutaneous Amylin 355. The 12-week trial is investigating safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of different doses of Amylin 355 in people with overweight, obesity. Looking ahead, later in Q4, we anticipate the first phase 3 results for CagriSema mainly from the REDEFINE 1 study.

pairs.en: The second pivotal trial for CagriSema, REDEFINE 2 will read out in the first half of 2025. As we approach the year-end, we're also looking forward to the phase 3 results for STEP UP involving semaglutide 7.2 milligram. And finally, in the first half of '25, we're expecting the phase 1 readout for subcutaneous amycretin in obesity. Within Rare Disease in Q3, we have initiated a phase 1 trial with Inno8, an oral once-daily antibody fragment for the treatment of hemophilia A.
pairs.zh:
CagriSema的第二项关键试验REDEFINE 2将在2025年上半年公布结果。随着年底临近，我们也期待涉及semaglutide 7.2毫克的STEP UP的3期结果。最后，在2025年上半年，我们预计皮下注射amycretin用于肥胖症的1期数据将出炉。在罕见病领域，第三季度我们已启动了Inno8的1期试验，Inno8是一种每日一次的口服抗体片段，用于治疗血友病A。

原文：
The second pivotal trial for CagriSema, REDEFINE 2 will read out in the first half of 2025. As we approach the year-end, we're also looking forward to the phase 3 results for STEP UP involving semaglutide 7.2 milligram. And finally, in the first half of '25, we're expecting the phase 1 readout for subcutaneous amycretin in obesity. Within Rare Disease in Q3, we have initiated a phase 1 trial with Inno8, an oral once-daily antibody fragment for the treatment of hemophilia A.

pairs.en: Moreover, the FRONTIER 5 trial with Mim8 was successfully completed. The trial was an open-label safety study in people with hemophilia A and demonstrated that switching from emicizumab treatment to Mim8 treatment appear to be safe and well tolerated. Lastly, within Rare Disease, we have successfully completed the phase 2 interim part of the HIBISCUS phase 2/3 trial in people with sickle cell disease. The interim analysis established proof of concept for etavopivat in sickle cell disease, and etavopivat appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile.
pairs.zh:
此外，针对Mim8的FRONTIER 5试验已成功完成。该试验是一项针对血友病A患者的开放标签安全性研究，结果表明从emicizumab治疗转换为Mim8治疗似乎是安全且耐受性良好的。最后，在罕见病领域，我们已成功完成了针对镰状细胞病患者的HIBISCUS 2/3期试验的2期中期部分。中期分析确立了etavopivat在镰状细胞病中的概念验证，且etavopivat表现出安全且耐受性良好的特征。

Moreover, the FRONTIER 5 trial with Mim8 was successfully completed. The trial was an open-label safety study in people with hemophilia A and demonstrated that switching from emicizumab treatment to Mim8 treatment appear to be safe and well tolerated. Lastly, within Rare Disease, we have successfully completed the phase 2 interim part of the HIBISCUS phase 2/3 trial in people with sickle cell disease. The interim analysis established proof of concept for etavopivat in sickle cell disease, and etavopivat appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile.

pairs.en: The phase 3 part of the HIBISCUS trial is currently ongoing with expected readout in 2026. With that, over to you, Karsten.
pairs.zh:
HIBISCUS试验的3期部分目前正在进行中，预计2026年得出结果。下面交给Karsten。

The phase 3 part of the HIBISCUS trial is currently ongoing with expected readout in 2026. With that, over to you, Karsten.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In the first nine months of 2024, our sales grew by 23% in Danish kroner and 24% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years and phasing of rebates in 2023.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Martin。请翻到下一页。2024年前九个月，我们的销售额以丹麦克朗计算增长23%，按固定汇率计算增长24%，这得益于两个运营部门的推动。在美国，销售增长受到与前几年相关的总净销售额调整以及2023年返利阶段化的积极影响。

Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In the first nine months of 2024, our sales grew by 23% in Danish kroner and 24% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years and phasing of rebates in 2023.

pairs.en: Sales growth has resulted in periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. The gross margin increased to 84.6%, compared to 84.5% in 2023. The increase is mainly driven by positive price impact due to the gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. and a positive product mix.
pairs.zh:
销售增长导致多个产品和地区出现周期性供应限制和相关药品短缺通知。毛利率增至84.6%，而2023年为84.5%。这一增长主要得益于美国与往年相关的总净销售额调整带来的积极价格影响，以及积极的产品组合。

Sales growth has resulted in periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. The gross margin increased to 84.6%, compared to 84.5% in 2023. The increase is mainly driven by positive price impact due to the gross-to-net sales adjustments related to prior years in the U.S. and a positive product mix.

pairs.en: This is partially countered by costs related to the ongoing capacity expansions. Sales and distribution costs increased by 10% in both Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy, while in International operations, the increase is mainly related to obesity care market development activities, Wegovy launch activities as well as promotional activities for GLP-1 diabetes products. Additionally, the increase in sales and distribution costs is impacted by adjustments to legal provisions in the second quarter of 2023.
pairs.zh:
这在一定程度上被与持续产能扩张相关的成本所抵消。以丹麦克朗和固定汇率计算，销售及分销成本均增长了10%。在北美运营中，成本增加主要源于与Wegovy相关的促销活动；而在国际运营中，增长主要与肥胖症护理市场开发活动、Wegovy的上市活动以及GLP-1糖尿病产品的促销活动相关。此外，销售及分销成本的增加还受到2023年第二季度法律条文调整的影响。

This is partially countered by costs related to the ongoing capacity expansions. Sales and distribution costs increased by 10% in both Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy, while in International operations, the increase is mainly related to obesity care market development activities, Wegovy launch activities as well as promotional activities for GLP-1 diabetes products. Additionally, the increase in sales and distribution costs is impacted by adjustments to legal provisions in the second quarter of 2023.

pairs.en: Research and development costs increased by 56%, both measured in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. The increase in costs is mainly reflecting increased late-stage clinical trial activity and increased early research activities as well as the impairment loss related to intangible assets, including ocedurenone at DKK 5.7 billion. Administration costs increased by 9%, both in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 21% measured in Danish kroner and by 22% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
以丹麦克朗计值和按固定汇率计算，研发成本均增长了56%。成本增长主要反映了后期临床试验活动增加、早期研究活动增加，以及与无形资产相关的减值损失，其中包括ocedurenone的57亿丹麦克朗。以丹麦克朗计值和按固定汇率计算，行政成本均增长了9%。以丹麦克朗计值，营业利润增长了21%；按固定汇率计算，增长了22%。

Research and development costs increased by 56%, both measured in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. The increase in costs is mainly reflecting increased late-stage clinical trial activity and increased early research activities as well as the impairment loss related to intangible assets, including ocedurenone at DKK 5.7 billion. Administration costs increased by 9%, both in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 21% measured in Danish kroner and by 22% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: Operating profit is impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone of DKK 5.7 billion. And as a consequence, EBITDA increased by 28% measured in Danish kroner and by 30% at constant exchange rates. Net financial items showed a net gain of DKK 32 million, compared to a net gain of DKK 1.246 billion last year. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in the first nine months of 2024, compared to 19.9% in the first nine months of 2023.
pairs.zh:
营业利润受到与ocedurenone相关的57亿丹麦克朗减值损失的影响。因此，按丹麦克朗计价的EBITDA增长了28%，按固定汇率计算则增长了30%。金融项目净收益为3200万丹麦克朗，而去年为12.46亿丹麦克朗的净收益。2024年前九个月的有效税率为20.6%，而2023年前九个月为19.9%。

Operating profit is impacted by the impairment loss related to ocedurenone of DKK 5.7 billion. And as a consequence, EBITDA increased by 28% measured in Danish kroner and by 30% at constant exchange rates. Net financial items showed a net gain of DKK 32 million, compared to a net gain of DKK 1.246 billion last year. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in the first nine months of 2024, compared to 19.9% in the first nine months of 2023.

pairs.en: Net profit increased by 18%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 19% to DKK 16.29. Net profit and diluted earnings per share are negatively impacted by the DKK 5.7 billion impairment of ocedurenone. Free cash flow realized in 2024 was DKK 71.8 billion, compared to DKK 75.6 billion in the first nine months of 2023. The lower free cash flow reflects increasing capital expenditure partially countered by net cash generated from operating activities.
pairs.zh:
净利润增长18%，稀释每股收益增长19%至DKK 16.29。净利润和稀释每股收益受到ocedurenone减值57亿DKK的负面影响。2024年实现的自由现金流为DKK 718亿，而2023年前九个月为DKK 756亿。自由现金流下降反映了资本支出增加，部分被经营活动产生的净现金所抵消。

Net profit increased by 18%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 19% to DKK 16.29. Net profit and diluted earnings per share are negatively impacted by the DKK 5.7 billion impairment of ocedurenone. Free cash flow realized in 2024 was DKK 71.8 billion, compared to DKK 75.6 billion in the first nine months of 2023. The lower free cash flow reflects increasing capital expenditure partially countered by net cash generated from operating activities.

pairs.en: Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was DKK 31.1 billion, compared to DKK 16.4 billion in 2023. This was primarily driven by investments in additional capacity for API production and fill/finish capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products. The extensive increase in capital expenditure underscores our dedication to internal growth initiatives as part of our capital allocation strategy. Our No.
pairs.zh:
资本支出中，用于不动产、厂房和设备的金额为311亿丹麦克朗，而2023年为164亿丹麦克朗。这主要得益于对API生产额外产能以及当前和未来注射及口服产品的灌装/封装能力的投资。资本支出的大幅增长凸显了我们对内部增长计划的承诺，这是资本配置战略的一部分。我们的No.

原文：
Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was DKK 31.1 billion, compared to DKK 16.4 billion in 2023. This was primarily driven by investments in additional capacity for API production and fill/finish capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products. The extensive increase in capital expenditure underscores our dedication to internal growth initiatives as part of our capital allocation strategy. Our No.

pairs.en: 1 priority is to invest in internal growth opportunities followed by returning capital to shareholders through dividends and pursuing business development opportunities. Finally, we view the share buyback program as a flexible measure contingent on the first three priorities. This allows us to effectively distribute potential excess cash. Please go to the next slide.
pairs.zh:
第一优先事项是投资于内部增长机会，其次是通过股息向股东返还资本，以及寻求业务发展机会。最后，我们将股票回购计划视为取决于前三项优先事项的灵活措施。这使我们能够有效分配潜在的超额现金。请转到下一页幻灯片。

1 priority is to invest in internal growth opportunities followed by returning capital to shareholders through dividends and pursuing business development opportunities. Finally, we view the share buyback program as a flexible measure contingent on the first three priorities. This allows us to effectively distribute potential excess cash. Please go to the next slide.

pairs.en: We continued the growth momentum in 2024 and have narrowed our sales growth guidance to between 23% and 27% at constant exchange rates. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and International operations, mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatments for both Obesity and Diabetes care. Following the expectation of continued volume growth and capacity limitations at some manufacturing sites, the outlook also reflects continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. Novo Nordisk is investing in internal and external capacity to increase supply both short and long term.
pairs.zh:
我们继续2024年的增长势头，并将按固定汇率计算的销售增长指引收窄至23%至27%之间。该指引反映了北美业务和国际业务的销售增长预期，主要受基于GLP-1的肥胖症和糖尿病护理治疗药物销量增长的推动。考虑到销量持续增长的预期以及部分生产基地的产能限制，该展望也反映了多个产品和地区持续出现的阶段性供应限制及相关药品短缺通知。诺和诺德正在投资内部和外部产能，以增加短期和长期的供应。

原文：
We continued the growth momentum in 2024 and have narrowed our sales growth guidance to between 23% and 27% at constant exchange rates. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and International operations, mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatments for both Obesity and Diabetes care. Following the expectation of continued volume growth and capacity limitations at some manufacturing sites, the outlook also reflects continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies. Novo Nordisk is investing in internal and external capacity to increase supply both short and long term.

pairs.en: Operating profit growth is now expected to be between 21% and 27% at constant exchange rates. Capital expenditure is still expected to be around DKK 45 billion in 2024, reflecting expansion of the global supply chain. The free cash flow is now expected to be between DKK 57 million and DKK 65 billion, reflecting the sales growth and favorable impact from rebates in the U.S. countered by investments in capital expenditure.
pairs.zh:
预计营业利润增长率（按固定汇率计算）将在21%至27%之间。2024年资本支出仍预计约为DKK 450亿，反映了全球供应链的扩张。自由现金流预计将在DKK 5700万至DKK 650亿之间，这反映了销售增长以及美国返利的有利影响，但被资本支出投资所抵消。

原文：
Operating profit growth is now expected to be between 21% and 27% at constant exchange rates. Capital expenditure is still expected to be around DKK 45 billion in 2024, reflecting expansion of the global supply chain. The free cash flow is now expected to be between DKK 57 million and DKK 65 billion, reflecting the sales growth and favorable impact from rebates in the U.S. countered by investments in capital expenditure.

pairs.en: The updated cash flow expectation mainly reflects phasing of payments related to rebates in the U.S. as well as timing of investments related to capital expenditure. Income under the 340B program in the U.S. has been partially recognized.
pairs.zh:
更新后的现金流预期主要反映了美国返利相关的支付分期安排以及资本支出相关的投资时间。美国340B计划下的收入已被部分确认。

The updated cash flow expectation mainly reflects phasing of payments related to rebates in the U.S. as well as timing of investments related to capital expenditure. Income under the 340B program in the U.S. has been partially recognized.

pairs.en: One ruling from the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit remains pending and along with the DC Circuit, ruling may be subject to further discretionary appellate review before the U.S. Supreme Court. Depending on the outcome of any subsequent rulings and appeals in these matters, there may be a material impact on Novo Nordisk's financial position, net sales, and cash flow.
pairs.zh:
美国第七巡回上诉法院的一项裁决尚未作出，且与哥伦比亚特区巡回上诉法院的裁决一同，可能还需提交至美国最高法院进行进一步酌情上诉审查。这些事项后续裁决和上诉的结果，可能对Novo Nordisk的财务状况、净销售额和现金流产生重大影响。

One ruling from the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit remains pending and along with the DC Circuit, ruling may be subject to further discretionary appellate review before the U.S. Supreme Court. Depending on the outcome of any subsequent rulings and appeals in these matters, there may be a material impact on Novo Nordisk's financial position, net sales, and cash flow.

pairs.en: The Catalent transaction is still expected to close toward the end of the year, and financial impacts have not been included in the financial guidance. Contingent on the timing of closing, the acquisition is expected to have a low single-digit negative impact on operating profit growth in 2024 and low to mid-single-digit impact in 2025. That covers the outlook for 2024. Now back to you, Lars.
pairs.zh:
Catalent交易预计仍将在年底前完成，相关财务影响尚未纳入财务指引。取决于完成时间，此项收购预计将对2024年营业利润增长产生低个位数的负面影响，对2025年产生低至中个位数的影响。以上为2024年展望。现在交回给您，Lars。

The Catalent transaction is still expected to close toward the end of the year, and financial impacts have not been included in the financial guidance. Contingent on the timing of closing, the acquisition is expected to have a low single-digit negative impact on operating profit growth in 2024 and low to mid-single-digit impact in 2025. That covers the outlook for 2024. Now back to you, Lars.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Thank you, Karsten. Please turn to the final slide. We are very pleased with the sales growth in the first nine months of 2024. The growth is driven by increasing demand for our GLP-1-based diabetes and obesity treatments, reflecting the continued scaling of our supply chain.
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: The way that we think about this is that we have three sets of data to look at from a modeling perspective. And since we have produced a lot of documents and had a number of interactions with regulators, and it's basically based on those interactions that we believe, while not concluded at this point, we still believe that the deal will close by end of this year. As to supply and 2025 guidance. Then first of all, it's important to note, as we also showed in one of the prior slides by Camilla, that we scaled the number of people we've reached with GLP-1s by a factor 3 over the last three years and now have around two-thirds of the market of GLP-1 treatments on Novo products.

pairs.en: And that's scaling. Of course, we're focused on continuing that type of scaling into the coming years. So to get a sense for what could growth mathematically be next year, then if you take that magnitude and apply it to a higher base, namely, this year's sales, and then adjust for the tailwind we've had from favorable U.S.
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: So the regulatory framework in the MASH space is that regulators, at the end of the day, require hard endpoints -- hard liver endpoints, but also hard cardiovascular endpoints because these patients also die from cardiovascular disease. However, the authorities also acknowledge that there's a huge unmet need in this space, and therefore, the agreement that we have with the regulators is that we could do this interim analysis based on liver histology -- liver biopsies and histology on those liver biopsies and we can get a conditional regulatory approval if we see improvement in steatosis and fibrosis. So based on the data that we've announced and that we've seen, we aim to do a regulatory filing to get the approval for MASH and thereby also continuing the ESSENCE trial to get the harder endpoints in the coming years that the regulators will require. I'll leave it to Camilla to talk to the commercial position.
pairs.zh:
因此，在MASH领域的监管框架是，监管机构最终要求采用硬终点——包括肝脏硬终点，同时也有心血管硬终点，因为这些患者也会因心血管疾病死亡。然而，监管机构也承认该领域存在巨大的未满足需求，因此我们与监管机构达成共识：我们可以基于肝脏组织学（即肝脏活检及其组织学检查）进行期中分析，如果观察到脂肪变性和纤维化有所改善，就能获得有条件的监管批准。因此，基于我们已经公布和观察到的数据，我们计划提交监管申请以获得MASH的批准，同时继续进行ESSENCE试验，以期在未来几年内获取监管机构所需的更硬终点。我将让Camilla来谈谈商业状况。

So the regulatory framework in the MASH space is that regulators, at the end of the day, require hard endpoints -- hard liver endpoints, but also hard cardiovascular endpoints because these patients also die from cardiovascular disease. However, the authorities also acknowledge that there's a huge unmet need in this space, and therefore, the agreement that we have with the regulators is that we could do this interim analysis based on liver histology -- liver biopsies and histology on those liver biopsies and we can get a conditional regulatory approval if we see improvement in steatosis and fibrosis. So based on the data that we've announced and that we've seen, we aim to do a regulatory filing to get the approval for MASH and thereby also continuing the ESSENCE trial to get the harder endpoints in the coming years that the regulators will require. I'll leave it to Camilla to talk to the commercial position.

Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Yes. Thanks a lot there, Martin. So there's no doubt that there's a very big unmet need in this area, and we expect that around 22 million people are living with MASH F2 to F4. And this is, of course, in the U.S.
pairs.zh:
是的。非常感谢你，Martin。毫无疑问，这一领域存在着巨大的未满足需求，我们预计约有2200万人患有MASH F2至F4期。当然，这仅在美国。

原文：Yes. Thanks a lot there, Martin. So there's no doubt that there's a very big unmet need in this area, and we expect that around 22 million people are living with MASH F2 to F4. And this is, of course, in the U.S.

pairs.en: alone so no doubt that there is a big unmet need. We, of course, expect that in the last few years, there's been a better understanding of the importance of treating serious chronic diseases related also to obesity. And we know that, of course, also diagnostic space has a big impact here. So of course, that in itself is something that we're also focusing on from a commercial point of view via partnerships to make sure that the diagnostics are in place, both, you can say, blood-based but also scanning based so that we don't have to rely on only liver biopsies.
pairs.zh:
仅此一点就毫无疑问存在巨大的未满足需求。当然，我们预计在过去几年中，人们已经更好地认识到治疗与肥胖相关的严重慢性疾病的重要性。而且我们知道，诊断领域对此也有重大影响。因此，这本身也正是我们从商业角度通过合作伙伴关系重点关注的事项，以确保诊断手段到位，既包括基于血液的检测，也包括基于扫描的检测，这样我们就不必仅依赖肝活检。

原文：alone so no doubt that there is a big unmet need. We, of course, expect that in the last few years, there's been a better understanding of the importance of treating serious chronic diseases related also to obesity. And we know that, of course, also diagnostic space has a big impact here. So of course, that in itself is something that we're also focusing on from a commercial point of view via partnerships to make sure that the diagnostics are in place, both, you can say, blood-based but also scanning based so that we don't have to rely on only liver biopsies.

pairs.en: But of course, it's important that all of this works out toward the launch. So I think all in all, we feel that here we have an important asset that can make a big difference in an area where there previously has been very limited treatment.

pairs.en: Yeah, absolutely. So I can't speculate as to what other people have been thinking about the monlunabant data, but I can tell you what we've been thinking about it. We have all along communicated two things. First of all, obviously, we have a high focus on the safety aspects of this class of drugs.
pairs.zh:
没错，确实如此。我无法猜测其他人对monlunabant数据的看法，但我可以告诉你我们自己的看法。我们一直在传达两件事。首先，显然，我们高度关注这类药物的安全性。

原文：
Yeah, absolutely. So I can't speculate as to what other people have been thinking about the monlunabant data, but I can tell you what we've been thinking about it. We have all along communicated two things. First of all, obviously, we have a high focus on the safety aspects of this class of drugs.

pairs.en: There is a history and we need to make sure that we only introduce safe drugs into the market, in this business and all other spaces. And secondly, I think people tend to forget that we've all along, to that end, we would conduct a phase 2b trial to really establish the safety profile of monlunabant before we progress into further development. And we communicated that actually before we saw the data. Then we saw the data and they actually confirmed that we saw a good efficacy profile of monlunabant.
pairs.zh:
这里涉及到既往经验，我们必须确保只将安全的药物推向市场，无论是这项业务还是其他领域。其次，我认为人们往往忽略了一点：我们始终为此目标，在进行下一阶段开发之前，会对monlunabant开展2b期临床试验以充分验证其安全性。事实上，我们早在看到数据之前就已传达过这一点。随后我们看到了数据，这些数据也确实证实了monlunabant具有良好的疗效特征。

There is a history and we need to make sure that we only introduce safe drugs into the market, in this business and all other spaces. And secondly, I think people tend to forget that we've all along, to that end, we would conduct a phase 2b trial to really establish the safety profile of monlunabant before we progress into further development. And we communicated that actually before we saw the data. Then we saw the data and they actually confirmed that we saw a good efficacy profile of monlunabant.

pairs.en: We also saw both gastrointestinal, but also some neuropsychiatric events increasing with those. On the efficacy part, it was very clear that we were high on the dose response and exposure response curve, indicating maybe that too high doses have been tested from a clinical and from a commercial perspective, and therefore, we can actually say that this works from a weight loss perspective, but we have to work with the dosing to mitigate potential safety issues. And that is exactly what we intend to do in the phase 2b trial. So from our perspective, still a potential.
pairs.zh:
我们还观察到胃肠道和神经精神事件随之增加。在疗效方面，很明显我们处于剂量反应和暴露反应曲线的高点，这表明从临床和商业角度来看，可能测试了过高剂量。因此，我们实际上可以说，从减重角度来看这是有效的，但我们必须调整剂量以减轻潜在的安全问题。这正是我们在2b期试验中打算做的。所以从我们的角度来看，这仍是一个有潜力的方案。

原文：
We also saw both gastrointestinal, but also some neuropsychiatric events increasing with those. On the efficacy part, it was very clear that we were high on the dose response and exposure response curve, indicating maybe that too high doses have been tested from a clinical and from a commercial perspective, and therefore, we can actually say that this works from a weight loss perspective, but we have to work with the dosing to mitigate potential safety issues. And that is exactly what we intend to do in the phase 2b trial. So from our perspective, still a potential.

pairs.en: It's still high risk. We communicated that all along as well, but something that we will, as planned, continue to investigate further in a phase 2b trial.
pairs.zh:
风险依然很高。我们也一直传达这一点，但按照计划，我们将在phase 2b trial中继续进一步研究。

It's still high risk. We communicated that all along as well, but something that we will, as planned, continue to investigate further in a phase 2b trial.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Yeah. Thank you, Jacob, and thank you, Jo, for the question. So I would say our first and foremost concern about compounding is really the product quality what patients are exposed to. And I think that's quite alarming what we see of safety reports, even hospitalization and death.
pairs.zh:
好的。首先，我们最担心的是药物配制中患者接触到的产品质量。我认为我们看到的安全报告，甚至住院和死亡情况，非常令人担忧。

原文：
Yeah. Thank you, Jacob, and thank you, Jo, for the question. So I would say our first and foremost concern about compounding is really the product quality what patients are exposed to. And I think that's quite alarming what we see of safety reports, even hospitalization and death.

pairs.en: So we feel an obligation for taking action on this. So patients who seek treatment and perhaps believe they're getting a quality product from Novo Nordisk is not misled, and with that, say, belief, treat themselves for something that's potentially harmful. So we have been in dialogue with the FDA based on our increasing supply to the U.S. of Wegovy, including increasing supply of the starter doses agreed with the FDA that this is increasing to a magnitude where they can take away the drug shortage notification also on the starter dose.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们感到有义务对此采取行动。如此一来，寻求治疗的患者——他们可能认为自己从诺和诺德公司获得了高质量产品——就不会被误导，并带着这种信念用潜在有害的东西自我治疗。基于我们向美国供应的Wegovy不断增加（包括起始剂量的供应增加），我们一直在与美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）沟通。我们与FDA达成一致：由于供应量已增至一定程度，他们可以取消针对起始剂量的药品短缺通知。

原文：
So we feel an obligation for taking action on this. So patients who seek treatment and perhaps believe they're getting a quality product from Novo Nordisk is not misled, and with that, say, belief, treat themselves for something that's potentially harmful. So we have been in dialogue with the FDA based on our increasing supply to the U.S. of Wegovy, including increasing supply of the starter doses agreed with the FDA that this is increasing to a magnitude where they can take away the drug shortage notification also on the starter dose.

pairs.en: So we are off for all doses. And that, of course, means that we will see, say, an uptick in the U.S. in the coming weeks in terms of supply. To your question about what share compounders take, honestly, we don't know.
pairs.zh:
所以我们现在所有剂量都已经发出。这当然意味着在未来几周内，我们在美国的供应量会有所上升。至于你提到的复合配药商占据多少份额，老实说，我们不知道。

So we are off for all doses. And that, of course, means that we will see, say, an uptick in the U.S. in the coming weeks in terms of supply. To your question about what share compounders take, honestly, we don't know.

pairs.en: There are hundreds, if not thousands of potential compounders in the U.S. and we have limited visibility to what the supply. My understanding is that it's primarily in, say, the Internet, say, direct-to-consumer space and we promote our products as products for people living with serious chronic disease and they should really be helped by insurance. And I don't think these products are in, say, the classical insurance channel.
pairs.zh:
美国有数百甚至数千家潜在的compounders，我们对供应情况了解有限。据我所知，这些主要出现在互联网领域，比如直接面向消费者的渠道。我们推广产品时，将其定位为面向患有严重慢性病的人群的产品，他们确实应该得到保险支持。但我认为这些产品并不在传统的保险渠道中。

原文：There are hundreds, if not thousands of potential compounders in the U.S. and we have limited visibility to what the supply. My understanding is that it's primarily in, say, the Internet, say, direct-to-consumer space and we promote our products as products for people living with serious chronic disease and they should really be helped by insurance. And I don't think these products are in, say, the classical insurance channel.

pairs.en: So we feel confident in our ability to scale and treat more and more patients. But for us, it's really not about a business opportunity. It's more about the safety for patients, and no patient should believe that they get access to semaglutide and not being the case because we're the only one producing an approved version of semaglutide.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们对自己扩大规模并治疗更多患者的能力充满信心。但对我们来说，这真的不是商业机会，而是关乎患者的安全。任何患者都不应该认为他们能获取到semaglutide，而情况并非如此，因为我们是唯一生产获批版本semaglutide的公司。

原文：
So we feel confident in our ability to scale and treat more and more patients. But for us, it's really not about a business opportunity. It's more about the safety for patients, and no patient should believe that they get access to semaglutide and not being the case because we're the only one producing an approved version of semaglutide.

pairs.en: And that acceleration will be driven by both units. Then a nice acceleration in IO in the third quarter, now growing at 22% in the quarter and to get to Q4, even further acceleration into the fourth quarter. As to supply between Ozempic and Wegovy, then, yes, you are correct.

pairs.en: So far, IO has been constrained on Ozempic. On the other hand, you see 60-plus percent sales growth for Rybelsus in IO. So that's kind of the portfolio play we're pursuing in that geography. And then with now more than 15 Wegovy launches in IO, the momentum we are building there is, of course, rather substantial.
pairs.zh:
到目前为止，IO在Ozempic上受到限制。另一方面，你在IO看到Rybelsus的销售增长超过60%。这就是我们在该地区正在推行的产品组合策略。此外，随着目前IO已有超过15个Wegovy上市，我们在那里建立的势头当然相当可观。

So far, IO has been constrained on Ozempic. On the other hand, you see 60-plus percent sales growth for Rybelsus in IO. So that's kind of the portfolio play we're pursuing in that geography. And then with now more than 15 Wegovy launches in IO, the momentum we are building there is, of course, rather substantial.

pairs.en: Yes. Thank you very much. As you know, we have a strategy that says that we address both diabetes, but specifically obesity with a holistic approach, building the broadest possible pipeline to cater to individual patient needs. These are complex diseases.
pairs.zh:
是的，非常感谢。如您所知，我们的策略是以整体方法应对糖尿病，特别是肥胖症，构建最广泛的管线以满足个体患者的需求。这些是复杂的疾病。

Yes. Thank you very much. As you know, we have a strategy that says that we address both diabetes, but specifically obesity with a holistic approach, building the broadest possible pipeline to cater to individual patient needs. These are complex diseases.

pairs.en: And it's very, very clear also if you take the analogy from GLP-1, you can always address the same biology with slightly different modalities. Our own analogy is moving from liraglutide to semaglutide, changing the pharmacokinetics and thereby also the pharmacodynamics in a beneficial way. The Amylin biology is, at least at the receptor level, even more complex than GLP-1, and therefore, to build a broader pipeline of different generations of Amylin assets is prudent. I think it's too early to speculate before we've seen any clinical data where and how we would see that being positioned.
pairs.zh:
同样，如果你从GLP-1药物的类比中可以非常清楚地看到，你总是可以通过略微不同的方式来针对相同的生物学机制。我们自己的类比是从liraglutide转向semaglutide，改变药代动力学，从而也以有益的方式改变药效学。Amylin生物学至少在受体层面上甚至比GLP-1更复杂，因此，建立更广泛的多代Amylin资产管线是明智的。我认为在看到任何临床数据之前，推测其定位位置和方式还为时过早。

And it's very, very clear also if you take the analogy from GLP-1, you can always address the same biology with slightly different modalities. Our own analogy is moving from liraglutide to semaglutide, changing the pharmacokinetics and thereby also the pharmacodynamics in a beneficial way. The Amylin biology is, at least at the receptor level, even more complex than GLP-1, and therefore, to build a broader pipeline of different generations of Amylin assets is prudent. I think it's too early to speculate before we've seen any clinical data where and how we would see that being positioned.

So could you share with us what kind of level of side effects and GI side effects you are all looking for? Will it be the same vein as sema monotherapy or higher? And my second question, very quick.

pairs.en: Based on what we know and based on how we understand the biology, as you said yourself, we expect to see really unsurpassed weight loss. At this point in time, we expect to see good glycemic control in type 2 diabetes together with a strong weight loss. And based on what we've seen so far, that will come with a safety and tolerability profile broadly in line with what we see with GLP-1 treatment.
pairs.zh:
根据我们已知的生物学知识以及您刚才提到的理解，我们预计会看到前所未有的减重效果。就目前而言，我们预期在2型糖尿病方面能够实现良好的血糖控制，同时伴随显著的体重下降。基于迄今观察到的数据，其安全性和耐受性特征将与GLP-1治疗的情况大致相符。

Based on what we know and based on how we understand the biology, as you said yourself, we expect to see really unsurpassed weight loss. At this point in time, we expect to see good glycemic control in type 2 diabetes together with a strong weight loss. And based on what we've seen so far, that will come with a safety and tolerability profile broadly in line with what we see with GLP-1 treatment.
