pairs.en: Thank you so much. I have two questions, please. So firstly, at the CMD earlier this year, Novo shared that cagrilintide is sourced externally through CDMO contracts. So in light of what appears to be a very likely commercial launch roughly a year from now, I wanted to ask if external CDMO sourcing of cagri remains the plan.
pairs.zh:
非常感谢。我有两个问题。首先，在今年早些时候的资本管理日（CMD）上，Novo分享了cagrilintide是通过CDMO合同从外部采购的。因此，考虑到大约一年后很可能就会进行商业上市，我想问一下，外部CDMO采购cagri是否仍是计划。

Thank you so much. I have two questions, please. So firstly, at the CMD earlier this year, Novo shared that cagrilintide is sourced externally through CDMO contracts. So in light of what appears to be a very likely commercial launch roughly a year from now, I wanted to ask if external CDMO sourcing of cagri remains the plan.

pairs.en: And while producing cagri in-house is not critical in light of the experience from semaglutide. And then, secondly, I wonder if you could remind me, assuming antitrust authorities, for whatever reason, still decide to try and block the Catalent transaction, what flexibility do you have in that Plan B to scale up capacity as quickly as possible, not least in light of constraints for expertise in setting up these sites? Thanks so much.
pairs.zh:
虽然考虑到semaglutide的经验，内部生产cagri并非关键。其次，我想请您提醒我，假设反垄断机构出于任何原因仍决定尝试阻止Catalent交易，那么在B计划中，您有多大灵活性来尽快扩大产能，尤其是考虑到建立这些工厂的专业知识限制？非常感谢。

And while producing cagri in-house is not critical in light of the experience from semaglutide. And then, secondly, I wonder if you could remind me, assuming antitrust authorities, for whatever reason, still decide to try and block the Catalent transaction, what flexibility do you have in that Plan B to scale up capacity as quickly as possible, not least in light of constraints for expertise in setting up these sites? Thanks so much.

pairs.en: Yes. Thank you for those questions, Mattias. It's correct that the cagri component we source externally and that's basically based on a consideration around capabilities and manufacturing footprints. So it's a rational choice.
pairs.zh:
是的。感谢您提出的问题，Mattias。我们外部采购cagri组件是正确的，这主要是基于对产能和制造布局的考量。因此这是一个理性的选择。

原文：Yes. Thank you for those questions, Mattias. It's correct that the cagri component we source externally and that's basically based on a consideration around capabilities and manufacturing footprints. So it's a rational choice.

pairs.en: And of course, we take historic learnings with us in terms of ensuring that we have a resilient setup into the future for our external sourcing approaches, including cagrilintide. Then secondly, on Catalent and the so-called Plan B, yes, that we do have. That's part of running business when you don't have 100% certainty. And this is really a question about continuing to scale the way we've been scaling in the past few years.
pairs.zh:
当然，我们会吸取历史经验，确保未来的外部采购方式（包括cagrilintide）具备弹性结构。其次，关于Catalent和所谓的B计划——是的，我们确实有。当你无法100%确定时，这就是运营的一部分。这实际上是一个关于如何延续过去几年扩张方式的问题。

And of course, we take historic learnings with us in terms of ensuring that we have a resilient setup into the future for our external sourcing approaches, including cagrilintide. Then secondly, on Catalent and the so-called Plan B, yes, that we do have. That's part of running business when you don't have 100% certainty. And this is really a question about continuing to scale the way we've been scaling in the past few years.

pairs.en: So really driving more output from our internal supply chain as well as continue to contract the external capacity should we get into that situation.
pairs.zh:
因此，如果我们陷入那种情况，就需要真正提高内部供应链的产出，同时继续减少外部产能。

So really driving more output from our internal supply chain as well as continue to contract the external capacity should we get into that situation.

Yeah. Thank you, Jacob. And once again, I would like to thank Doug for his exceptional leadership over quite some years of our U.S. operations and wish Dave more good luck as his successor.
pairs.zh:
是的。谢谢你，Jacob。同时，我要再次感谢Doug多年来对我们美国业务的卓越领导，并祝愿Dave接替他的职位后一切顺利。

Yeah. Thank you, Jacob. And once again, I would like to thank Doug for his exceptional leadership over quite some years of our U.S. operations and wish Dave more good luck as his successor.

pairs.en: As we've spoken about, Novo Nordisk is in a strong growth momentum and that's driven by our GLP-1 products, both in diabetes and obesity. And I hope it's also clear for all of you that we are scaling significantly to sustain this attractive growth profile in the coming years. And we also have very exciting phase 3 readouts later this year. So we look forward to sharing those data with you in the future and to have robust discussions around that.
pairs.zh:
正如我们之前讨论过的，Novo Nordisk目前处于强劲的增长势头，这得益于我们的GLP-1产品，在糖尿病和肥胖症领域均是如此。我也希望各位清楚，我们正在大幅扩展规模，以在未来几年维持这一诱人的增长态势。此外，今年晚些时候我们还将迎来非常令人振奋的3期临床数据公布。因此，我们期待未来能与各位分享这些数据，并围绕它们展开深入讨论。

As we've spoken about, Novo Nordisk is in a strong growth momentum and that's driven by our GLP-1 products, both in diabetes and obesity. And I hope it's also clear for all of you that we are scaling significantly to sustain this attractive growth profile in the coming years. And we also have very exciting phase 3 readouts later this year. So we look forward to sharing those data with you in the future and to have robust discussions around that.

pairs.en: So with that, thank you again for your interest, and we hereby close the call. Thank you.
pairs.zh:
因此，再次感谢您的关注，我们在此结束通话。谢谢。

So with that, thank you again for your interest, and we hereby close the call. Thank you.
